mobileBorder4.label: Wrapped for mobile / 4-space left border / 39 wide
mobileBorder4.exampleInput: “Proofcase” is a collection of self-contained Rocq developments. Each component is designed to stand independently, typically as a formal companion to a paper, note, or conceptual construction.

plain75.label: Plain text / normal / 75 wide
plain75.exampleInput: This formatter produces plain wrapped text with no surrounding comment box. Paragraphs stay separate, lines are wrapped to width 75, and the right edge remains ragged.

plainJustified75.label: Plain text / justified / 75 wide
plainJustified75.exampleInput: This formatter produces plain wrapped text with no surrounding comment box. Paragraphs stay separate, lines are wrapped to width 75, and interior lines are justified to a straight right edge.

starredBox75.label: Justified text / starred box / 75 wide
starredBox75.exampleInput: There is no finitely supported row `u` whose one-step Rule 30 image is exactly the centered seed row. A single seeded defect cannot be created in one forward step by a finitely supported predecessor.

artifactComment39.label: Doc. comment / 2-space pad / 39 wide
artifactComment39.exampleInput: We strip all factors of 2 from a positive natural number. The fuel parameter bounds the recursion; n itself suffices since div2 strictly decreases positive values.
